notes:
v1.5.0 Update
- Item purchase requirements: shop items can require the buyer to own specific items, with optional consume on purchase.
- Requirement editor in Shop Settings with drag-and-drop item targeting.
- Personal discounts: per-buyer percent discounts with an actor picker dialog, stacking with shop multiplier and item discounts.
- Randomized shop prices: stable per-item price variance that stamps once and never rerolls on open.
- Shop entry methods: choose G-key, double-click, or both per shop.
- Key Hints toggle in Shop Settings to hide bottom navigation hints.
- Requirements now appear in the item detail panel across all 11 themes.
- Theme-specific requirement styling for purchase confirmation and detail panel.
- Grid theme item thumbnails now show item artwork instead of category glyphs.
- grid-fantasy and character-fantasy search bar and header improvements.
- Fixed grid-fantasy item list spacing and subfolder-hosted Foundry instance imports.
- Fixed Frenzy theme detail pane not scrolling, which hid the purchase button when requirement rows or long descriptions were present.
- Fixed vendor currency not incrementing when purchasing items from a shop with infinite funds disabled.

announcement.title: 🛍️ Stylish Shop v1.5.0
announcement.content:
Stylish Shop v1.5.0 adds purchase requirements, personal discounts, randomized prices, and shop entry methods.

  • Shop items can require the buyer to own specific items before purchasing, with an optional consume flag that spends them on success.
  • Per-buyer personal discounts with an actor picker dialog (search, PC/NPC filters, portraits). Discounts stack with the shop multiplier and per-item discount, enforced server-side.
  • Price Variance (%) gives each item a stable random price within a set range, stamped once so it never rerolls when the shop opens.
  • Shop Settings now lets GMs choose G-key, double-click, or both as entry methods per shop.
  • Purchase requirements now appear in the item detail panel across all 11 themes, not just the purchase confirmation.
  • Grid themes now show item artwork in buy and sell rows instead of category glyphs.
  • Fixed Frenzy theme detail pane not scrolling when requirement rows pushed the purchase button out of view.
  • Fixed vendor currency not incrementing when purchasing items from a shop with infinite funds disabled.
